name: convergence-ddd-aggregate
description: Optional Domain-Driven Design aggregate boundary decision support — invariant-first modeling, anti-pattern checks, and trade-off records. Use only for DDD contexts.

activation.note: This module is opt-in. Do not activate unless the project explicitly uses Domain-Driven Design aggregate modeling.

scopeConstraint: DDD contexts only — do not activate for projects that do not use aggregate-based domain modeling
